jobs.title: Junior Game Designer - Remote
jobs.description: Live Indeed search for remote junior game designer roles. Designs and tunes gameplay systems, levels, and mechanics. Unity/Unreal, prototyping, playtesting. Open to recent graduates.

jobs.title: Entry-Level Game Programmer - Remote
jobs.description: Live Indeed search for entry-level game programmer roles. Implement and maintain gameplay systems and tools; performance analysis. Bachelor's in CS or game development; Unreal Engine / C++ / system design.

jobs.title: Technical Artist (Junior) - Remote
jobs.description: Live Indeed search for junior technical artist roles. Bridge art and engineering - shaders, tools, pipelines in Unity/Unreal, Blender/Maya. Portfolio required.

jobs.title: Entry-Level Game Developer - Remote
jobs.description: Live Indeed search for entry-level remote game developer roles. Gameplay scripting, prototyping, bug-fixing. Strong fit for a recent game-design graduate with a portfolio.

jobs.title: Lead Technical Artist - Unannounced Project
Junior Software Developer - Tulsa
jobs.description: Live Indeed search for junior software developer roles in Tulsa. C#/JavaScript/Python; a realistic local bridge for a game-design grad while building a game portfolio on the side.

jobs.title: Game Developer - Remote
jobs.description: Live Indeed search for remote game developer roles. Implement gameplay features and tools in Unity or Unreal Engine (C#/C++). Portfolio or game-jam projects valued for new grads.

jobs.title: Associate UI/UX Designer - Remote
jobs.description: Live Indeed search for associate UI/UX designer roles. Interaction design, wireframes, prototyping (Figma). Transferable from game UI design; remote-friendly.

jobs.title: Lead Game Designer - Monopoly Go!
QA Tester - Games, Remote
jobs.description: Live Indeed search for remote games QA tester roles. Test builds, write repro steps, log bugs. Common first job into the industry for new grads; bridges into design over time.
